spoken_slips_bracketed.note: Tom names helium as the 5% constituent but immediately reads it as hydrogen and the diagnosis depends on it being hydrogen.

factual_issues_flagged_for_layer3.issue: Tom attributes methanol-producing metabolism to polyethylene glycol; the metabolic pathway he describes is in fact ethylene glycol's. PEG is not significantly metabolized.
factual_issues_flagged_for_layer3.disposition: preserved per constitutional §16; consider layer 3 footnote

factual_issues_flagged_for_layer3.issue: Tom mentions 'F20' and self-questions 'is that the Raptor?' The Raptor is F-22; F-20 was the Northrop Tigershark. Tom's uncertainty is on tape.
factual_issues_flagged_for_layer3.disposition: preserved verbatim with Tom's self-question; not bracketed
